assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has a RingCentral account or can create one
Developer has basic knowledge of REST APIs and OAuth authentication

developer_goal: To build an application or integration that uses RingCentral's communication APIs.

first_success.outcome: Developer obtains valid app credentials, authenticates, and successfully calls a RingCentral API endpoint
first_success.observable_signal: API call returns a successful response indicating the call was placed or data retrieved

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: SDKs
candidates.reason: SDKs are client libraries to facilitate API usage but the core first-mile onboarding is documented via the REST API usage.

candidates.name: Embeddable Communications Client (RingEX)
candidates.reason: RingEX is a specialized integration solution for embedding communications in CRM apps, not the primary onboarding surface for general API developers.

prerequisites.description: Have a RingCentral account to register an application and obtain credentials
Register an application in the RingCentral Developer Portal to obtain client ID and client secret
Understand basic REST API concepts and OAuth authentication

external_gates.description: Developer must have or create a RingCentral account to register an app
App registration requires providing valid information to obtain client credentials
Developer must correctly implement OAuth or JWT authentication to obtain a valid token

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully making the first API call using the sample app with valid authentication

sources.title: RingEX Integration Apps | RingCentral Developers
evidence_supported: Embed a phone and log calls seamlessly in your CRM

uncertainties.question: What is the typical or average time to first success as claimed by RingCentral?
uncertainties.impact: Without a vendor claim or documented metric, time estimates for onboarding cannot be provided.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official documentation does not specify any time-to-first-success metric or estimate.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted RingCentral route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
